title: Need a Monday.com consultant in Colorado Springs
excerpt:
We are a growing, mid-sized construction company and we need a local consultant in, or very near, Colorado Springs, CO to help build out our boards. 
Thank you

posts.author: Katdago (kat dagostino)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a growing, mid-sized construction company and we need a local consultant in, or very near, Colorado Springs, CO to help build out our boards.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Katdago ,

I am a certified monday consultant having experience in delivering solutions to many constructions usecases. I would love hear about your process and help you out accordingly.

Feel free to connect at aquibcs@outlook.com

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: Hezibo (Hezi Bosmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Katdago

My Calendly

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @katdago

Being a recognized monday.com consulting firm, we help many construction businesses build and optimize their workflows and boards on the monday.com platform.

I’d like to mention that our consultants are experienced with needs like yours as they’ve implemented such solutions for some previous clients.

Our consultants can also work at your required timing and provide remote support extensively. I can ensure you will be satisfied with our consultant’s approach.

Please connect with our consultants and take your project forward.

posts.author: WildcardInsights (Anne Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Have you found someone to help yet? I am located in Lakewood, CO. I am a Monday partner and certified expert.
